summary: Memory Increase - Brain Training Game app project on ICP (Internet Computer Platform). User wants to rebuild the app to get a new working link after experiencing 'Canister ID not resolved' errors.
architectural_notes: App is deployed on Internet Computer (ICP) blockchain as a PWA web app

existing_features.title: Rebuild and redeploy the entire Memory Increase Brain Training Game application — frontend and backend — to generate a fresh canister deployment with a new working live URL.
